description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior features a mix of smooth concrete or stucco walls, large glass windows, and some dark accent panels. There is a small front yard with a paved driveway and a palm tree, while the rear includes a private green space and patio area. The house appears to have a single story with a rooftop terrace or accessible flat roof. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes providing natural light to the interior. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and minimalist design, featuring a small front yard and rear patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a paved driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wall, minimal window openings, and the presence of a palm tree in the front yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private green space, patio area, and more windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long wall, small windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and rear patio.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade and minimal decorative elements
